/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/vehicle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/drone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/mission_drone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/autonomous_drone.cpp.o -o /home/srikar/part1/src/drone_sim
